chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3914 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.16024 of 2025. (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections 1 to 10. 3. For orders on Misc. No16025 of 2025 (exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 08.08.2025 Mr. S. Ghulam Hasnain, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Mohammad Ashraf Samoo, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. K.A. Wasvani, APG Sindh. Mr. S. Ghulam Hasnain, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Mohammad Ashraf Samoo, Advocate for the Petitioners, submits that the grievance of the petitioners is that their application dated 25.06.2025 is pending before the Deputy Commissioner, Malir Karachi and the same has not yet been decided. Learned AAG present in Court in other matters waives notice of this petition and submits that the Deputy Commissioner, Malir Karachi will decide such application (if pending before him) within 30 days. Learned counsel for the Petitioners is satisfied on such statement of learned APG and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to the Deputy Commissioner, Malir Karachi to decide the application of the petitioners (if any pending before him) in accordance with law within a period of thirty days after providing proper opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS/
